items.title: Cloudflare Identifies Query Planning Bottleneck in ClickHouse
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Identifies Query Planning Bottleneck in ClickHouse. Cloudflare recently described how a slowdown in its billing pipeline was traced to contention inside the query planning stage of ClickHouse.

items.title: How OpenAI Built a Secure Windows Sandbox for Codex Agents
items.summaryShort: How OpenAI Built a Secure Windows Sandbox for Codex Agents. OpenAI details Codex Windows sandbox architecture, showing how SIDs, ACLs, restricted tokens, and dedicated sandbox accounts enable safe execution of autonomous coding tasks.

items.title: Presentation: Platform Teams Enabling AI - MCP/Multi-Agentic Tools across Linkedin
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Platform Teams Enabling AI - MCP/Multi-Agentic Tools across Linkedin. LinkedIn’s Karthik Ramgopal and Prince Valluri discuss leveraging AI as a new execution model for large-scale engineering.

items.title: Dropbox Introduces Nova, an Internal Platform for Running AI Coding Agents at Scale
items.summaryShort: Dropbox Introduces Nova, an Internal Platform for Running AI Coding Agents at Scale. Dropbox has unveiled Nova, an internal platform designed to orchestrate and operationalize AI coding agents across the company's engineering workflows.

items.title: How Netflix Maps Thousands of Microservices in Real-Time
items.summaryShort: How Netflix Maps Thousands of Microservices in Real-Time. Netflix has shared details about Service Topology.

items.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
items.summaryShort: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks. Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared

items.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri's highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
items.summaryShort: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri's highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates. Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.

items.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
items.summaryShort: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor. Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.
